title: Sour Flaky Tunisian Chickpea Toast
description: A vibrant and energizing Tunisian-inspired dish featuring the bold flavors of chickpeas, English mustard, and a hint of sourness, all on toasted bread. This vegan-friendly recipe is perfect for a quick and satisfying snack or light lunch.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut the dough into long, thin strips, about 1 inch wide.
Place the strips on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each strip.
Bake the pastry strips in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the pastry is baking, mix the chickpeas, English mustard, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
Toast the whole wheat bread until lightly browned.
Spread the chickpea mixture on top of the toasted bread.
Once the pastry strips are ready, place them on top of the chickpea mixture.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
